meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Cursor for iOS
products.tagline: Build with coding agents from anywhere
products.summaryZh: 随时随地，用编码智能体构建一切
products.descriptionZh: Cursor 现已推出原生 iOS 应用公测版，让你随时随地构建代码。此前，开发者一直受限于本地设备的性能，不得不半开着笔记本电脑，走到哪里都离不开咖啡因。借助 Cursor for iOS，你可以在云端启动始终在线的代理，或通过手机控制电脑上运行的代理。灵感闪现时即刻启动任务，工作就绪时收到通知，随时随地进行 PR 合并。
products.description: Cursor is now available as a native iOS app in public beta, so you can build from anywhere. Until now, developers have worked around the limits of their local machines, keeping laptops half-open and caffeinated everywhere they go. With Cursor for iOS, you can launch always-on agents in the cloud, or control agents running on your computer from your phone. Kick them off when ideas strike, get notified when work is ready for review, and merge PRs on the go.

products.name: Skills Marketplace by Databox
products.tagline: Ready-made AI analytics skills for your business data
products.summaryZh: 即用型AI分析技能，适配您的业务数据
products.descriptionZh: 现成的技能库，涵盖付费广告、网站性能、电商、收入等领域。每个技能从您的实时性能数据中提取信息，一分钟内生成一份完整的、可分享的报告。在Claude中运行即可在聊天中获取答案，或在n8n中设置定时任务，自动发送至Slack或邮箱。免费下载。
products.description: A library of ready-made skills for paid ads, website performance, ecommerce, revenue, and more. Each skill pulls from your live performance data and returns a finished, shareable report in under a minute. Run them in Claude when you want answers in chat, or schedule them in n8n to land in Slack or email automatically. Free to download.

products.name: Foresight by Lightning Rod
products.tagline: Predict anything with AI
products.summaryZh: 用AI预测一切
products.descriptionZh: Lightning Rod 推出的 Foresight 是一款兼容 OpenAI 的预测 API，专为构建智能体、预测市场机器人和决策工具的开发者设计。用户可针对未来事件提问，并获得经过评分与校准的预测结果。与通用大语言模型不同，Foresight 基于真实世界结果进行训练与评估，具备经基准验证的准确性、更低的推理成本，并提供可直接接入预测工作流的 API。
products.description: Foresight by Lightning Rod is an OpenAI-compatible forecasting API for developers building agents, prediction-market bots, and decision tools. Ask a question about a future event and get a scored, calibrated forecast back. Unlike general-purpose LLMs, Foresight is trained and evaluated on real-world outcomes, with benchmark-verified accuracy, cheaper inference, and a drop-in API for forecasting workflows.

products.name: Akiflow
products.tagline: Manage tasks and calendars from Claude, ChatGPT or Cursor
products.summaryZh: 从Claude、ChatGPT或Cursor管理任务和日历
products.descriptionZh: Akiflow是一款数字规划与日历工具，专为忙碌的专业人士设计，用于集中管理任务、统一日程并优化生产力。体验全球排名第一的时间块规划应用。
products.description: Akiflow is a digital planner and calendar for centralising tasks, unifying schedules, and optimising productivity., built for busy professionals! Experience the world's #1 Time Blocking app.

products.name: Supafax
products.tagline: Email-native assistant that learns how you work
products.summaryZh: 原生邮件助手，学习你的工作方式
products.descriptionZh: Supafax 是一款原生邮件助手，能学习你的工作方式，自动排序收件箱、起草回复并端到端安排会议。
products.description: Supafax is an email-native assistant that learns how you work and prioritizes your inbox, drafts replies, and schedules meetings end-to-end.

products.name: v0 Design Systems 2.0
products.tagline: Build with your components, colors, fonts, and patterns
products.summaryZh: 使用你的组件、颜色、字体和图案进行构建
products.descriptionZh: v0 Design Systems 2.0 现已推出。您现在可以从团队已有的来源导入系统：GitHub 仓库、公开和私有 npm 包、Storybook 与文档、Figma 画板、截图、ZIP 文件以及真实应用。v0 会学习您的设计系统实际使用方式，并基于您的组件和令牌创建一个交互式工作区。预览结果，在对话中持续迭代，准备就绪后即可保存。
products.description: v0 Design Systems 2.0 is here. You can now import your system from the sources your team already uses: GitHub repos, public and private npm packages, Storybook and docs, Figma frames, screenshots, ZIPs, and real apps. v0 learns how your design system is actually used and creates a playground with your components and tokens. Preview the result, keep iterating in chat, and save it when it's ready.

products.name: Dayflow
products.tagline: Open source tools that help you get promoted
products.summaryZh: 帮助你获得晋升的开源工具
products.descriptionZh: 升职不仅靠出色完成工作，更靠记住并证明它。你还记得23周前完成了什么吗？Dayflow是一款本地优先的macOS应用，利用屏幕数据和AI自动记录你的工作日。无需计时器，无需手动记录。每个修复的bug、撰写的文档、解决的问题都会被捕捉——随时用于站会、一对一沟通和绩效评估。支持运行任意模型（本地或云端），所有数据保留在Mac上。开源，MIT许可。
products.description: Getting promoted isn't just about doing great work - it's about remembering and proving it. Can you remember what you accomplished 23 weeks ago? Dayflow is a local-first macOS app that uses your screen data and AI to automatically journal your workday. No timers, no manual logging. Every bug fixed, doc written, and problem solved is captured - ready for standups, 1:1s, and performance reviews. Run any model (local or cloud), keep everything on your Mac. Open source, MIT licensed.

products.name: Pluno
products.tagline: Browser agent that’s 10x faster than Claude
products.summaryZh: 比Claude快10倍的浏览器代理
products.descriptionZh: Pluno在浏览器中彻底超越了Claude。Claude在UI上点击操作如同醉醺醺的实习生——而Pluno直接与API对话，速度提升10倍，消耗的token减少10倍。它能即时学习新工具，像专家一样使用每个网页应用。经过500多个网页应用的测试，Pluno的表现均优于Claude。Claude只会点击——Pluno却能完成任务。发布日福利：免费获得50美元额度。
products.description: Pluno just killed Claude in the browser. Claude clicks around the UI like a drunk intern - instead, Pluno talks directly to the API to act 10x faster, with 10x fewer tokens. Learns new tools instantly and uses every web app like a pro. Tested and outperformed Claude in 500+ web apps. Claude clicks - Pluno gets it done. Launch day: get $50 in free credits.

products.name: AgentPeek
products.tagline: Claude Code & Codex in your Mac notch
products.summaryZh: Claude Code & Codex 位于你的 Mac 刘海区域
products.descriptionZh: 你运行的编码代理比以往任何时候都多，但已经跟不上它们的节奏了。这时AgentPeek就派上了用场。它将每个会话实时拉取到你的Mac刘海区域。只需抬眼一瞥，批准提示，查看token用量，管理整个流程，无需中断YouTube视频。一切本地运行，完全属于你。
products.description: You're running more coding agents than ever, but you can't keep up with them. That's where AgentPeek comes in. It pulls every session up into your Mac notch, live. Glance up, approve a prompt, watch token usage and manage the entire flow without pausing your YouTube video. All local, all yours.

products.name: Brain2Qwerty v2
products.tagline: Decode sentences directly from non-invasive brain signals
products.summaryZh: 直接从非侵入式脑信号解码语句
products.descriptionZh: Brain2Qwerty v2是Meta推出的非侵入式脑机接口，通过解码原始MEG脑信号生成文本。该技术采用端到端深度学习与大语言模型，无需手术即可实现高达78%的单词准确率。
products.description: Brain2Qwerty v2 is a non-invasive brain-computer interface from Meta that decodes raw MEG brain signals into text. Using end-to-end deep learning and LLMs, it reaches up to 78% word accuracy without surgery.

products.name: Load Nova
products.tagline: An AI co-pilot and dashboard built for dispatcher speed
products.summaryZh: 专为调度员速度打造的AI副驾与仪表盘
products.descriptionZh: 一个调度员专属工作台。减少标签页切换。更智能的货运。Load Nova 是一个Chrome侧边栏与仪表盘，与您的货源面板并行运行。解析经纪商邮件、计算实时每英里收入与利润、结合实时天气规划路线——全程在3分钟内完成。无需切换标签页。核心功能：统一调度仪表盘、AI辅助货源规划、司机与货物管理、路线与HOS感知、邮件与工作流自动化、实时运营洞察。在ChatGPT内工作。
products.description: One workspace for dispatchers. Less tab switching. Smarter freight. Load Nova is a Chrome side panel and Dashboard that lives next to your load board. Parse broker emails, calculate real RPM & profit, plan routes with live weather — end-to-end in under 3 minutes. No tab switching. Key features: Unified dispatch dashboard AI-assisted load planning Driver and load management Route & HOS awareness Email and workflow automation Real-time operational insights Work inside ChatGPT

products.name: Justwrite
products.tagline: A private, local-first writing space that works offline
products.summaryZh: 一个私密、本地优先的写作空间，支持离线使用。
products.descriptionZh: Justwrite 是一款无干扰笔记应用，专为快速、私密的写作而设计。无需登录、不依赖云端、自动保存、支持离线、专注模式、Markdown 快捷键、导出功能以及沉浸式写作模式。
products.description: Justwrite is a distraction-free notes app for fast, private writing. No login, no cloud dependency, autosave, offline support, focus mode, markdown shortcuts, exports, and ambient writing modes.

products.name: Oakamo
products.tagline: Your quiet space for reading articles later.
products.summaryZh: 你的安静空间，稍后阅读文章。
products.descriptionZh: 网络上优质内容很多，但稍后阅读往往意味着分心、广告和无尽的标签页。我开发了 Oakamo，让阅读重新变得愉悦。从任何地方保存文章，在个人图书馆中整理，在干净无干扰的阅读器中阅读，标记重要段落，并随时收听。Oakamo 专为热爱阅读、希望以更平静、更从容的方式享受网络的人打造。
products.description: The web is full of great content, but reading later often means distractions, ads, and endless tabs. I built Oakamo to make reading enjoyable again. Save articles from anywhere, organize them in your personal library, read in a clean distraction-free reader, highlight important passages, and listen on the go. Oakamo is built for people who love reading and want a calmer, more thoughtful way to enjoy the web.

products.name: Clade
products.tagline: AI COO that runs your team in tools you already use
products.summaryZh: AI COO，在你已使用的工具中运行你的团队
products.descriptionZh: Clade 是团队的 AI 首席运营官。它存在于 Telegram、Slack 和 iMessage 中，无需额外维护新的仪表盘——你像对待队友一样给它发消息即可。Clade 会追踪状态更新，推动客户和项目工作进展，起草后续跟进内容，并在问题恶化前标记出疏漏之处。当你需要全局视图时，网页应用就是你的驾驶舱。专为那些宁愿交付而非管理的团队打造。
products.description: Clade is your AI COO for teams. It lives in Telegram, Slack, and iMessage, so there's no new dashboard to babysit - you message it like a teammate. Clade chases status updates, keeps client and project work moving, drafts the follow-ups, and flags what's slipping before it becomes a fire. The web app is your cockpit when you want the full picture. Built for teams who'd rather ship than manage.

products.name: Bilt.me - Figma
products.tagline: Get a real mobile app from your Figma design
products.summaryZh: 从你的Figma设计稿生成真正的移动应用
products.descriptionZh: 你在Figma里设计好了全部内容。然后不得不雇人手动逐像素重建，结果只做到"差不多"。现在不必了。把Figma画板拖进Bilt，它们就会变成真正的iPhone应用。你的间距、字体、颜色，分毫不差。代码也归你所有。
products.description: You designed the whole thing in Figma. Then you had to hire someone to rebuild it by hand, pixel by pixel, and it came out "close enough." Not anymore. Drop your Figma frames into Bilt and they become a real app for iPhone. Your spacing, your fonts, your colors, exactly. You even own the code.

products.name: DropK
products.tagline: The tray that doesn't pretend
products.summaryZh: 不装腔作势的托盘
products.descriptionZh: 文本、文件、图片、文件夹——全部集中在一个拖放区，你可以自然地拖入或取出。它是Mac工作中“混乱中间地带”的落脚点，同时还能持续追踪你的剪贴板。处理项目时，清空你的工作台，逐一处理所有内容，DropK会将所有相关的复制文件/文本准备就绪并整齐排列。它不会复制你的文件——打开文件、文本等操作均通过保存的路径完成，而非副本。这是目前所有应用中都缺失的一环。
products.description: Text, files, images, folders - all in a single drop zone you drag into and pull out of naturally. It's the landing spot for "the messy middle of Mac work." and it can still keep tracking your clipboard. When on a project, clear your slate, work through everything, and DropK will have all related copied files/text ready and neatly arranged. It doesn't duplicate your files, opening files, text, all happen through saved paths, not duplicates. That's a genuinely missing link from all apps out there.

products.name: Midway Chat
products.tagline: Real-time member chat for Memberstack and Webflow sites
products.summaryZh: Memberstack 和 Webflow 网站的实时成员聊天功能
products.descriptionZh: Midway 是一个 iframe 嵌入组件，专为 Memberstack 认证和 Webflow 构建，因此设置只需几分钟。会员可获得实时私信、语音消息、回复、反应、输入状态提示、已读回执、在线状态以及聊天请求过滤功能以阻止垃圾信息。您的网站仍将是您社区的核心。
products.description: Midway is one iframe embed, built specifically around Memberstack auth and Webflow, so setup takes minutes. Members get real-time DMs, voice notes, replies, reactions, typing indicators, read receipts, online presence, and chat-request gating to block spam. Your site stays the home of your community.

products.name: Webless
products.tagline: AI search for websites that converts traffic into pipeline
products.summaryZh: 面向网站的AI搜索，将流量转化为销售线索
products.descriptionZh: 流量下降，意图上升。每位访客都更加重要。在为领先企业品牌提供AI搜索支持后，Webless现已开放自助服务。数分钟内即可启动AI驱动搜索、个性化旅程和动态CTA。将买家提问转化为转化率，以及驱动内容策略与AEO的第一方需求情报。无需重新设计，无需繁重工作，兼容任何CMS。30分钟内即可上线。
products.description: Traffic is down. Intent is up. Every visitor matters more. After powering AI search for leading enterprise brands, Webless is now self-serve. Launch AI-powered search, personalized journeys, and dynamic CTAs in minutes. Turn buyer questions into conversions and first-party demand intelligence that fuels your content strategy & AEO. No redesign. No heavy lift. CMS agnostic. Go live in under 30 minutes.

products.name: Tinkerfont
products.tagline: Free font playground for live websites
products.summaryZh: 实时网站的自由字体试验场
products.descriptionZh: Tinkerfont 是一款免费的 Chrome 扩展和 Firefox 插件，专为设计师、开发者和喜欢动手尝试的用户打造。它让你在真实网站上试验字体，无需打开开发者工具、改动设计系统或编辑样式表。
products.description: Tinkerfont is a free Chrome Extension and Firefox Add-on for designers, developers, and tinkerers who want to experiment with fonts on real websites -- without opening DevTools, touching the design system, or editing a stylesheet.

products.name: iVox
products.tagline: The first app dedicated to 1980s tape-edit effects.
products.summaryZh: 首款专注于1980年代磁带编辑效果的应用。
products.descriptionZh: iVox 将磁带多轨编辑这一失传技艺带到你的电脑上。其灵感源自拉丁狂徒、奥马尔·桑塔纳和切普·努涅斯——这些定义了80年代自由风、嘻哈音乐以及超级混音时代的先驱者——的传奇编辑风格。
products.description: iVox brings the lost art of tape multi-editing to your own computer. Inspired by the legendary editing style of The Latin Rascals, Omar Santana, and Chep Nunez — the pioneers who defined 80s freestyle, hip-hop, and the megamix era.
